message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
left to right direction

class BattlerOrder
class TurnSystem
class BattleFlow
class BattleContext
class PlayerMainTactics
class Player
class Battler

class ActiveTargetResult
interface ITargetable
class TargetSelection
class InvocationContext
interface AInvocationContext
class TurnContext

class PassiveProperty
class Ability
class TP
class Attribute
class Tolerance
class HP
class MP

class PassiveEffect
class PassiveEffectManager

class BattleEvent
class ActiveEffect
class BattleEventHandler

class ActiveProperty
class ActiveTargetRange
class ActiveTargetFilter

class VisualEffectContext
class VisualEffect

' Top chain
TurnSystem --> BattlerOrder
BattleFlow --> TurnSystem
BattleFlow o-- BattleContext

' Left side relations
BattleContext o-- Battler
BattleContext ..> PlayerMainTactics
Player --> PlayerMainTactics
Player o-- Battler : PartySkill

ActiveTargetResult o-- ITargetable
TargetSelection ..|> ITargetable
Battler --> ITargetable
Battler --> TargetSelection
InvocationContext --> TurnContext
AInvocationContext <|-- InvocationContext
Battler --> AInvocationContext
Battler --> TurnContext

' Passive/ability cluster
PassiveProperty o-- Ability : PassiveSkill
Ability --> TP
Ability --> Attribute
Ability --> Tolerance
Ability --> HP
Ability --> MP

Battler --> Ability
Battler --> PassiveEffectManager
PassiveEffectManager --> PassiveEffect

PassiveProperty o-- PassiveEffect
PassiveProperty o-- ActiveEffect

' Events/effects
PassiveEffect --> BattleEvent
ActiveEffect --> BattleEvent
BattleEventHandler o-- ActiveEffect
BattleEventHandler --> BattleEvent

' Active property / targeting / visuals
ActiveProperty o-- ActiveTargetRange
ActiveTargetRange o-- ActiveTargetFilter
ActiveProperty --> VisualEffect : ActiveEffect?
VisualEffect --> VisualEffectContext

@enduml
```
